name: Cauliflower and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut banana peppers in half lengthwise.
2. Place the halves on the bottom of a lightly greased 10x6x2 inch baking dish.
3. Steam cauliflower for 8 to 10 minutes until crisp but tender. Drain.
4. Place the drained cauliflower on top of the banana pepper halves.
5. Sprinkle with cheese and chopped red pepper.
6. Combine flour and 1/2 cup milk, stirring until smooth.
7. Add remaining milk and eggs, stirring well.
8. Pour the batter over the entire dish.
9. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
